title: Cabaret raises R50 000 for charities
description: GREAT BRAK NEWS AND VIDEOS - Attendees of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Video","html":"Gallery\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GREAT BRAK NEWS AND VIDEOS - Attendees of the glitzy and glamorous Great Brak Cabaret had a feast of entertainment last week as a variety of artists performed.","html":"GREAT BRAK NEWS AND VIDEOS - Attendees of the glitzy and glamorous Great Brak Cabaret had a feast of entertainment last week as a variety of artists performed."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The cabaret was presented twice at De Dekke restaurant, on the nights of 29 and 30 May."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Click here to see a gallery of photos from the Friday night, 30 May: Glitz, glam, fun and fabulousness of Great Brak Cabaret","html":"Click here to see a gallery of photos from the Friday night, 30 May: Glitz, glam, fun and fabulousness of Great Brak Cabaret"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The annual show, to raise funds for local charities, always attracts a capacity audience.","html":"The annual show, to raise funds for local charities, always attracts a capacity audience."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This year the show was called Night of the Suiderkruis Stars and performers and audience members certainly sparkled in their glittery outfits."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elvis Pressley (Fef Gericke) and Marilyn Monroe (Wendy Malan) impersonations, cabaret dancers, popular singers Jannie Moolman, Zanah-Lee Stanley, Petronel Baard and Anton Bouwer and more acts made the cabaret a resounding success.","html":"Elvis Pressley (Fef Gericke) and Marilyn Monroe (Wendy Malan) impersonations, cabaret dancers, popular singers Jannie Moolman, Zanah-Lee Stanley, Petronel Baard and Anton Bouwer and more acts made the cabaret a resounding success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisers promised an unforgettable night in support of two vital causes, CAWS 4 PAWS animal welfare charity and the Child Welfare SA Great Brak branch, and they certainly lived up to this, with R50 000 being raised, to be divided between the two.","html":"The organisers promised an unforgettable night in support of two vital causes, CAWS 4 PAWS animal welfare charity and the Child Welfare SA Great Brak branch, and they certainly lived up to this, with R50 000 being raised, to be divided between the two."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Videos from the Friday, 30 May, performance:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An interview with cabaret organiser Petro Taute:","html":"An interview with cabaret organiser Petro Taute:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does
